title: Exclude Template Assignments from "My Work"
excerpt:

posts.author: MarkP (Mark)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use templates with pre-filled assignees to save time on recurring annual work. Since our team doesn’t change often, it’s helpful to include People column assignments in the templates.

However, these assignments currently show up in users’ My Work, which can be confusing since the templates aren’t active boards. While we can adjust My Work settings, it would make more sense if templates behaved like archived boards, where assignments don’t appear by default.

Does anyone else include assignments in templates or are we the only ones?
